text: A small cluttered kitchen with stainless steel appliances.
a living room with couches a tv and chairs
Big city view with food trucks and many people
a toilet sits outside with a sign on it
A marble tabletop that has a coffee cup and saucer one one side and two plates of food on the other sides.
Some on had their feet on the desk where  the computer is.
A market scene with people on bicycles and horse carts.
A dog rides on the back of a sheep.
Small dark bear standing up on rocks outside
there is a skier riding on the snow
